c.d: Number of active users on the app, indicating potential audience reach.
Percentage or fixed fees charged per sale, affecting seller profitability.
How simple it is to list and sell items, including listing creation process and interface usability.
Availability and flexibility of shipping or local pickup options offered by the app to sellers.
Primary categories or niches the app caters to (e.g., clothes, electronics, furniture).
Features such as buyer feedback system, fraud prevention, and payment security that protect sellers.
